case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB, VS. DAVID TORRES ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-12-2019 CONTINUED TO MAY-14-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-12-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, DAVID AKA DAVID A TORRES, AKA DAVE TORRES, AN INDIVIDUAL $10,852.75 PRINCIPAL, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,287.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100070702)
